name: Dev Workbench
author: civicognita
description: IDE for code projects — file tree navigation, code editor with syntax highlighting, and build tools

permissions.reason: Runs development container with project tools
Writes changes back to project files

widgets.defaultValue: // Select a file from the project tree to start editing

prompts.label: Dev Assistant
prompts.systemPrompt: This is a software development project. Help the user write, debug, test, and refactor code. Be aware of the project's tech stack and conventions. Suggest improvements but respect existing patterns.

tools.label: Build
tools.command: cd /workspace && npm run build 2>&1 || pnpm build 2>&1 || echo 'No build script found'

tools.label: Test
tools.command: cd /workspace && npm test 2>&1 || pnpm test 2>&1 || echo 'No test script found'
